exampleTranslation: What began 21 months ago in the depths of winter cannot end on this autumn night. This victory alone is not the change we seek. It is only the chance for us to make that change. And that cannot happen if we go back to the way things were. It can't happen without you, without a new spirit of service, a new spirit of sacrifice. So let us summon a new spirit of patriotism, of responsibility, where each of us resolves to pitch in and work harder and look after not only ourselves but each other.

exampleTranslation: What I’m getting at is that Zamenhof not only built a linguistic object, but that behind that was an idea — an idea of brotherhood, a pacifist idea. That strength of an ideal — for which Esperantists were even persecuted under Nazism and Stalinism — is still conserved by the community of Esperantists. One cannot say that it has failed, but one thing needs to be said: the reason why any language is successful is always indefinable.

exampleTranslation: If there is anyone out there who still doubts that America is a place where all things are possible; who still wonders if the dream of our founders is alive in our time; who still questions the power of our democracy, tonight is your answer.

example: 让我们记住，是伊利诺伊州的一名男子首次将共和党的旗帜扛到了白宫。共和党是建立在自立、个人自由以及国家团结的价值观之上的。这也是我们所有人共同的价值观。虽然民主党今天晚上赢得了巨大的胜利，但我们是以谦卑的态度和弥合阻碍我们进步的分歧的决心赢得这场胜利的
exampleTranslation: Let's remember that it was a man from this state who first carried the banner of the Republican Party to the White House, a party founded on the values of self-reliance and individual liberty and national unity. Those are values that we all share. And while the Democratic Party has won a great victory tonight, we do so with a measure of humility and determination to heal the divides that have held back our progress.

translation: since (used after a specified time or event)

exampleTranslation: And I know you didn't do this just to win an election. And I know you didn't do it for me. You did it because you understand the enormity of the task that lies ahead. For even as we celebrate tonight, we know the challenges that tomorrow will bring are the greatest of our lifetime: two wars, a planet in peril, the worst financial crisis in a century.

translation: rather than... (used in expressions of the form 與其|与其[yu3 qi2] + {verb1} + 不如[bu4 ru2] + {verb2} "rather than {verb1}, better to {verb2}")
example: 21个月前在寒冬所开始的一切不应当在今天这个秋夜结束。今天的选举胜利并不是我们所寻求的改变--这只是我们进行改变的机会。如果我们仍然按照过去的方式行事，我们所寻求的改变将不会发生。没有你们，没有服务和牺牲的新精神，就不可能发生改变。因此，让我们发扬新的爱国和负责精神，所有的人都下定决心参与其中，更加努力地工作，不仅是为自己而是为彼此。
exampleTranslation: What began 21 months ago in the depths of winter cannot end on this autumn night. This victory alone is not the change we seek. It is only the chance for us to make that change. And that cannot happen if we go back to the way things were. It can't happen without you, without a new spirit of service, a new spirit of sacrifice. So let us summon a new spirit of patriotism, of responsibility, where each of us resolves to pitch in and work harder and look after not only ourselves but each other.

exampleTranslation: A qipao in the traditional style is made entirely by hand and requires labour-intensive manual tailoring techniques to enhance and exhibit every unique female form.

translation: to plot; to scheme; to bring about

exampleTranslation: He works in the planning section.

example: 我的首席策略师大卫-艾克斯罗德，他一直是追随我的伙伴。你们组建了政治史上最好的竞选团队，是你们成就了今天，我永远感谢你们为此所作出的牺牲。
exampleTranslation: To my chief strategist, David Axelrod, who's been a partner with me every step of the way. To the best campaign team ever assembled in the history of politics! You made this happen, and I am forever grateful for what you've sacrificed to get it done.

example: 当我们濒临死亡，我们应该独处。我们将摒离所有身外之物。世间的朋友们-跟我们的地位，财富和社会层次息息相关的朋友，都将离我们而去，只因我们即将步入黑暗的山谷。那些与陌生人紧紧相连的关系网-我们的亲属、我们的爱人、孩子、兄弟姐妹，还有那些不太亲却有共同朋友的人们，我们也必须要分开。现在，他们并没用离开我们。有一个比兄弟更亲的人-爱他自己也爱世间直到尽头。
exampleTranslation: When we come to die, we shall be alone. From all our worldly possessions we shall be about to part. Worldly friends — the friends drawn to us by our position, our wealth, or our social qualities, — will leave us as we enter the dark valley. From those bound to us by stronger ties — our kindred, our loved ones, children, brothers, sisters, and from those not less dear to us who have been made our friends because they and we are the friends of the same Saviour, — from them also we must part. Yet not all will leave us. There is One who "sticketh closer than a brother" — One who having loved His own which are in the world loves them to the end.

example: 这次大选创造了多项第一，也诞生了很多将世代流传的故事。但是今天晚上令我难忘的却是在亚特兰大投票的一名妇女：安-尼克松-库波尔。她和其他数百万排队等待投票的选民没有什么差别，除了一点：她已是106岁的高龄。
exampleTranslation: This election had many firsts and many stories that will be told for generations. But one that's on my mind tonight is about a woman who cast her ballot in Atlanta. She's a lot like the millions of others who stood in line to make their voice heard in this election, except for one thing: Ann Nixon Cooper is 106 years old.

example: 你知道如果你把泡菜插入電源插座，它會發光並且發出嗡嗡的聲音嗎？

translation: fork in road; bifurcation; branch in road, river, mountain range etc

exampleTranslation: A person with a sharp mind is like a nimble wanderer who can outpace others and reach places uncharted by the masses, yet they might overlook precious treasures along the way or at crossroads.

example: 仍有在孩子熟睡后仍难以入眠的父母，他们担心如何偿还按揭月供、付医药费或是存够钱让孩子上大学。
exampleTranslation: There are mothers and fathers who will lie awake after the children fall asleep and wonder how they'll make the mortgage, or pay their doctor's bills, or save enough for their child's college education.

example: 现在是我们回答这个问题的机会。这是我们的时刻这是我们的时代--让我们的人民重新就业，为我们的后代敞开机会之门，恢复繁荣，推进和平，重新确立“美国梦”，再次证明这样一个基本的真理：我们是一家人；只要一息尚存，我们就有希望；当我们遇到嘲讽和怀疑，当有人说我们办不到的时候，我们要以这个永恒的信条来回应他们。是的，我们能做到
exampleTranslation: This is our chance to answer that call. This is our moment. This is our time, to put our people back to work and open doors of opportunity for our kids; to restore prosperity and promote the cause of peace; to reclaim the American dream and reaffirm that fundamental truth, that out of many, we are one; that while we breathe, we hope. And where we are met with cynicism and doubt and those who tell us that we can't, we will respond with that timeless creed that sums up the spirit of a people: Yes, we can.

example: 约翰逊先生以前还倡议禁止在首都公交上饮酒，有人认为这个倡议有效减少了火车和公车上的犯罪率。
exampleTranslation: Previously, Mr Johnson also proposed banning the consumption of alcohol on public transport in the capital, which is believed to have reduced the crime rate on trains and buses.

exampleTranslation: In reality, translation is akin to working for peanuts, since the corresponding meaning of something in one language is often hidden in some deep and impenetrable recesses of the other. As a result, the translator is forced to search all over... Never mind that the picky reader is very difficult to fool.

example: 那些追求和平和安全的人们，我们支持你们。那些所有怀疑美国的灯塔能否能像以前一样明亮的人们，今天晚上我们再次证明，我们国家真正的力量并非来自我们武器的威力或财富的规模，而是来自我们理想的持久力量：民主、 自由、机会、不屈服的希望。
exampleTranslation: To those who seek peace and security. We support you. And to all those who have wondered if America's beacon still burns as bright, tonight we proved once more that the true strength of our nation comes not from the might of our arms or the scale of our wealth, but from the enduring power of our ideals: democracy, liberty, opportunity and unyielding hope.

exampleTranslation: It drew strength from the not-so-young people who braved the bitter cold and scorching heat to knock on doors of perfect strangers, and from the millions of Americans who volunteered and organized and proved that more than two centuries later a government of the people, by the people, and for the people has not perished from the Earth.

translation: to fight; to scuffle; to come to blows

exampleTranslation: Two men were fighting on the street.

translation: to size sb up; to look sb up and down; to take the measure of

exampleTranslation: He stared at me from head to foot.

example: 他喜欢打猎。
exampleTranslation: He likes hunting.

translation: to fight a battle; to go to war
example: 很多年輕人去了打仗。
exampleTranslation: Many young men went to war.

translation: at worst; if worst comes to worst; (usu. in the negative) serious; alarming
example: 这没什么大不了的。
exampleTranslation: It's no big deal.

example: 国王受够了他的大臣们总是对他阿谀奉承，于是把他们遣散了。
exampleTranslation: The king was tired of his sycophants always praising him, so he sent them away.

translation: in general; more or less; in rough terms; basically; on the whole; overall situation; the big picture; cadaver for dissection in training medical students
example: 大体上，我认为我的爱好很均衡，它们给我的生活带来轻松，并同时为我学习带来更集中的精力。
exampleTranslation: All in all, I think my hobbies are balanced; they bring some relaxation to my life, and at the same time bring focus to my studies.

example: 他们粗心大意，还没意识到危险。
exampleTranslation: They were carelessly unaware of the danger.

example: 这个项目我大致了解。
exampleTranslation: I know about this project for the most part.

example: 自由是有代价的。
exampleTranslation: Freedom has a cost.

translation: to act on behalf of sb in a responsible position; to act as an agent or proxy; surrogate
example: 万一有紧急情况，联系我的代理人。
exampleTranslation: In case of an emergency, get in touch with my agent.

example: 幼儿园里，老师正在带领小朋友们嘻戏。
exampleTranslation: The teachers are playing games with students in the kindergarten.

translation: to arrest; to apprehend; to take into custody; Taiwan pr. [dai3bu3]
example: 他超速駕駛，被警察逮捕了。
exampleTranslation: The policeman arrested him for speeding.

example: 我当你的担保人.
exampleTranslation: I will be your guarantor.

example: 汤姆害羞胆怯。
exampleTranslation: Tom is shy and cowardly.

example: 这次大选创造了多项第一，也诞生了很多将世代流传的故事。但是今天晚上令我难忘的却是在亚特兰大投票的一名妇女：安-尼克松-库波尔。她和其他数百万排队等待投票的选民没有什么差别，除了一点：她已是106岁的高龄。
exampleTranslation: This election had many firsts and many stories that will be told for generations. But one that's on my mind tonight is about a woman who cast her ballot in Atlanta. She's a lot like the millions of others who stood in line to make their voice heard in this election, except for one thing: Ann Nixon Cooper is 106 years old.

translation: off season; slow business season; see also 旺季[wang4 ji4]
example: 在旅游淡季，机票会很便宜。
exampleTranslation: When out of tourist season, the tickets will be cheap.

translation: Tamsui or Danshui, district of New Taipei City 新北市[Xin1 bei3 shi4], Taiwan
example: 我相信這條魚是淡水魚。
exampleTranslation: I believe this fish is a freshwater fish.

example: 我当初要是买音乐会的票就好了。
exampleTranslation: I wish I had bought a ticket for the concert.

translation: to sb's face; in sb's presence
example: 如果你们之间有问题，应该当面告诉他，不要在背后说他。
exampleTranslation: If you have a bone to pick with a person, tell it to his face instead of saying things behind his back.

translation: the present time; to be faced with
example: 根据当前的状况，这个项目绝对会成功。
exampleTranslation: Judging from the current situation, this project is sure to succeed.

translation: to be elected; to be selected
example: 谁将当选主席呢？
exampleTranslation: Who will be elected chairman?

example: 在这个国家，我们患难与共。让我们抵制重走老路的诱惑，避免重新回到令美国政治长期深受毒害的党派纷争、小题大作、不成熟的表现。
exampleTranslation: In this country, we rise or fall as one nation, as one people. Let's resist the temptation to fall back on the same partisanship and pettiness and immaturity that has poisoned our politics for so long.

example: 我在下载这份网络档案。
exampleTranslation: I'm downloading this internet archive.

example: 我们去一家档次再高点儿的餐厅怎么样？
exampleTranslation: Shall we go to a little more upscale restaurant?

translation: to go bankrupt; to close down
example: 公司很快就要倒闭了。
exampleTranslation: The company's going to go bankrupt really soon.

example: 我们走开的时候，房子被盗窃了。
exampleTranslation: Our house was robbed while we were away.

example: 這個藥很得力。
exampleTranslation: This medicine is very effective.

translation: to commit an offense; to violate the law; excuse me! (formal)
example: 小草间的对话不要得罪大树。
exampleTranslation: In conversation among the small grasses, do not offend the big tree.

example: 灯笼在树枝上吊着。
exampleTranslation: The lamp was suspended from the branch of a tree.

translation: to land; to come ashore; to make landfall (of typhoon etc)
example: 可能我的孙子会是登陆火星的第一人。
exampleTranslation: Maybe my grandchild will be the first person to set foot on Mars.

example: 我每周登录 tatoeba 一次。
exampleTranslation: I log in to Tatoeba once a week.

example: 你能把我的名字加到等候批准的申请人名单上吗？
exampleTranslation: Could you put my name on the waiting list?

example: 根据国土安全部的规定，目前的安全水准是橙色等级。
exampleTranslation: The security level, as established by the Department of Homeland Security, is orange.

translation: to open (one's eyes) wide; to stare at; to glare at
example: 他们惊得目瞪口呆。
exampleTranslation: They were left speechless.

example: 堤坝保护了城市免受洪灾。
exampleTranslation: The bank secured the city from a flood.

example: 他们就快从香港抵达了。
exampleTranslation: They are arriving here soon from Hong Kong.

example: 当移居者的村庄被野蛮人征服后，他们的希望和生活到了痛苦的尽头，数年对灾祸的抵抗结束了。
exampleTranslation: Years of resistance to misfortune ended when the settlers' village was overcome by the savages and their hopes and lives came to the bitter end.

translation: to resist; to boycott; to refuse (to cooperate)
example: 在这个国家，我们患难与共。让我们抵制重走老路的诱惑，避免重新回到令美国政治长期深受毒害的党派纷争、小题大作、不成熟的表现。
exampleTranslation: In this country, we rise or fall as one nation, as one people. Let's resist the temptation to fall back on the same partisanship and pettiness and immaturity that has poisoned our politics for so long.

translation: stage; degree (to which a situation has evolved); a (usu. bad) situation; leeway
example: 媒體對他所說的話斷章取義並發展到無法控制的地步了。
exampleTranslation: Just one part of what he said got picked up by the media and took on a life of its own.

example: 天行健，君子以自强不息；地势坤，君子以厚德载物。
exampleTranslation: As heaven maintains its vigorous motion, the noble person should strive for continuous self-improvement. As the earth's nature is receptive and nurturing, the noble person should cultivate great virtue to support and carry all things.

translation: to turn upside down; to reverse; back to front
example: 她被他迷得神魂颠倒。
exampleTranslation: She's completely crazy about him.

example: 这个典礼有多正式?
exampleTranslation: How formal is this ceremony?

example: 他是典型的日本人。
exampleTranslation: He is a typical Japanese.

example: 本来以为是开发板给我弄坏了，原来是电源线接触不良。
exampleTranslation: At first I thought the development board was up the spout, but it was just a loose connection.

example: 进家门后，我被垫子绊倒了。
exampleTranslation: Entering the house, I tripped over the mat.

translation: to hold with one's mouth (as a smoker with a cigarette or a dog with a bone)
example: 母鳥叼來蟲子餵幼鳥。
exampleTranslation: The mother bird brought worms for her young ones.

example: 这些高官和富商的大四合院常常有精美雕刻并粉刷的横梁和柱子，并伴有精心修剪的花园。
exampleTranslation: The large siheyuans of these high-ranking officials and wealthy merchants often featured beautifully carved and painted roof beams and pillars and carefully landscaped gardens.

translation: to suspend; to hang up; to hang a person
example: 若同期的人先一步完成銷售目標，我也不能再吊兒郎當了。
exampleTranslation: When one of my coworkers starts racking up good sales figures I can't let down my guard.

translation: to fall; to tumble; to trip
example: 米价下跌了。
exampleTranslation: The price of rice has come down.

translation: male adult; the 4th of the 10 Heavenly Stems 天干[tian1 gan1]; fourth (used like "4" or "D")
example: 這是個由不分老少、貧富、民主黨、共和黨；黑人、白人、拉丁裔、亞裔、美洲原住民；同性戀、異性戀人；肢障與四體健全者，大家共同訴說的答案。美國民眾向全世界發出訊息，我們絕非一盤散沙，也不是由紅州、藍州拼湊而成的集合體。
exampleTranslation: It's the answer spoken by young and old, rich and poor, Democrat and Republican, black, white, Hispanic, Asian, Native American, gay, straight, disabled and not disabled. Americans who sent a message to the world that we have never been just a collection of individuals or a collection of red states and blue states. We are, and always will be, the United States of America.

translation: to warn repeatedly; to urge; to exhort again and again
example: 真的不敢相信你在吃医生叮嘱不要食用的东西。
exampleTranslation: I can't believe you are eating something the doctor has told you repeatedly you shouldn't eat.

translation: to watch attentively; to fix one's attention on; to stare at
example: 他整天盯著你看，肯定是喜歡你了。
exampleTranslation: He's always looking at you. He must love you.

translation: at set dates; at regular intervals; periodic
example: 活火山会定期爆发。
exampleTranslation: The active volcano erupts at regular intervals.

example: 你怎么定义“幸福”？
exampleTranslation: How would you define "happiness"?

example: 多丢人啊！
exampleTranslation: How shameful!

example: 请把发动机关掉。

translation: to go on a journey; to leave

exampleTranslation: It will soon be daybreak and I have to leave.

translation: to set about (a task); to raise a hand to hit sb; to touch; to handle (typically used in cautioning sb *not* to touch sth)

exampleTranslation: It's good to do it yourself.

example: 我在想哪个跑步运动员会跑第一。
exampleTranslation: I wonder which of the runners will come first.

translation: classifier for houses or buildings; ridgepole (old)

translation: pocket; bag; to wrap up or hold in a bag
example: 去開車兜風怎樣？

example: 這條小路沿著陡峭的斜坡蜿蜒而上。
exampleTranslation: The path zigzagged up the steep slope.

example: 斗争结束了。
exampleTranslation: The fight is over.

example: 她在演唱会的场地贩卖毒品。
exampleTranslation: She's selling drugs at concerts.

example: 民主主义是多数选举的独裁。
exampleTranslation: Democracy is the dictatorship of the majority.

example: 這個工人本來應該在中午十二點到達, 但他被交通堵塞困住了幾個小時。
exampleTranslation: The handyman was supposed to arrive at twelve noon, but got stuck in a traffic jam for a few hours.

example: 严禁卖淫嫖娼，赌博，吸毒，酗酒滋事等违法犯罪活动！
exampleTranslation: Prostitution, gambling, the use of narcotic substances, drunkenness, disorder, and all other illegal activities are STRICTLY FORBIDDEN.

translation: (bound form) tip; end; extremity; (bound form) aspect; facet; (bound form) upright; proper
example: 在这个城市，白人和黑人间的争端愈演愈烈。
exampleTranslation: The conflict between blacks and whites in the city became worse.

example: 她是一位品行端正的女士。
exampleTranslation: She is a very correct lady.

example: 他跟他们干脆地断绝来往了。
exampleTranslation: He made a clean break with them.

example: 为了参加划船比赛，一支新的队伍组成了。
exampleTranslation: A new team was formed in order to take part in the boat race.

translation: to handle; to deal with; to tackle; to get by with; to make do; (dialect) (usu. used in the negative) to get along with (sb)
example: 如果必要的话，我不反对付特别费用。
exampleTranslation: I have no objection to paying a special fee if it is necessary.

translation: to correspond (to); to be equivalent to; to be a counterpart to
example: 翻译其实是一件吃力不讨好的事，因为一种语言在另一种语言中的对应物藏在往往隐藏在深不可测之处，翻译者需要百般寻觅，而且，挑剔的读者很难糊弄。
exampleTranslation: In reality, translation is akin to working for peanuts, since the corresponding meaning of something in one language is often hidden in some deep and impenetrable recesses of the other. As a result, the translator is forced to search all over... Never mind that the picky reader is very difficult to fool.

example: 看着自己的房子被烧得精光，他顿时丧失了理智。
exampleTranslation: He lost his reason when he saw his house burn down.

translation: to degrade; to degenerate; to become depraved
example: 你不要自甘堕落。
exampleTranslation: You don't have to kick yourself.

example: 电池要额外付钱。
exampleTranslation: You need to pay extra for the batteries.

example: 有点恶心，但是吐不出来。
exampleTranslation: I feel a little nauseous, but I'm unable to throw up.

example: 这些年空气质量恶化了。
exampleTranslation: Air quality has deteriorated these past few years.

translation: to check; to contain; to hold back
example: 我无法遏制住我的怒火。

example: 我只是不知道應該說什麼而已……
exampleTranslation: I just don't know what to say.

example: 树木排出氧气，吸收二氧化碳。
exampleTranslation: Trees give off oxygen and absorb carbon dioxide.

translation: to release; to issue; to announce
example: 房间挤满了等待发布会开始的记者。
exampleTranslation: The room was jam-packed with reporters waiting for the press conference to begin.

translation: to stare blankly; to be stunned; to be lost in thought
example: 望着天花板发呆,还不如读一读小说。
exampleTranslation: You might as well read a novel instead of staring at the ceiling.

translation: to start; to launch; to unleash
example: 请把发动机关掉。
exampleTranslation: Please turn off your engine.

translation: to become aware; to detect; to realize
example: 我发觉男孩儿酣然入睡了。
exampleTranslation: I found the boy fast asleep.

translation: to shoot (a projectile); to fire (a rocket); to launch
example: 俄罗斯去年发射了一个卫星。
exampleTranslation: A satellite was launched in Russia last year.

translation: to vow; to pledge; to swear
example: 他发誓要戒烟。
exampleTranslation: He vowed to give up smoking.

translation: to publish; to issue; to release; to distribute
example: 学习语言随着Skype的发行而变得更容易。
exampleTranslation: With the release of Skype, studying languages has become easier.

example: 他的肚脐发炎了。
exampleTranslation: He had an infection in his belly button.

translation: to develop; to make full use of
example: 21个月前在寒冬所开始的一切不应当在今天这个秋夜结束。今天的选举胜利并不是我们所寻求的改变--这只是我们进行改变的机会。如果我们仍然按照过去的方式行事，我们所寻求的改变将不会发生。没有你们，没有服务和牺牲的新精神，就不可能发生改变。因此，让我们发扬新的爱国和负责精神，所有的人都下定决心参与其中，更加努力地工作，不仅是为自己而是为彼此。
exampleTranslation: What began 21 months ago in the depths of winter cannot end on this autumn night. This victory alone is not the change we seek. It is only the chance for us to make that change. And that cannot happen if we go back to the way things were. It can't happen without you, without a new spirit of service, a new spirit of sacrifice. So let us summon a new spirit of patriotism, of responsibility, where each of us resolves to pitch in and work harder and look after not only ourselves but each other.

translation: legal person; corporation; see also 自然人[zi4 ran2 ren2]
example: 戲法人人會變，各有巧妙不同。
exampleTranslation: Everyone's tricks are different; each differs in ingenious ways.

translation: (bound form) foreign (non-Chinese); barbarian; classifier for processes or actions that take time and effort; (classifier) a kind; a sort
example: 番茄容易遭受很多病害。
exampleTranslation: The tomato is subject to a number of diseases.
